title: 你找到工作了吗？
description_uz: «Ish topdingmi? Hozir kichik kompaniyada ishlayapman.» — yangi ish haqidagi do'stona suhbat. Bu dialog kasb, ish vaqti va hamkasblar haqida so'rash, his-tuyg'u bildirishni mashq qiladi. Tanish mavzu, foydali ish so'zlari — tabiiy bo'lguncha takrorlash uchun qisqa. Shadowing va gapirish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Ты нашёл работу? Сейчас работаю в небольшой компании.» — дружеский разговор о новой работе. Этот диалог тренирует, как спрашивать о профессии, рабочем графике и коллегах и выражать чувства. Знакомая тема, полезная рабочая лексика — короткий, чтобы повторять до естественности. Отлично для шэдоуинга и речи.
description_en: «Did you find a job? I'm at a small company now.» — a friendly chat about a new job. This dialogue practices asking about someone's profession, working hours, and colleagues, and expressing how you feel. Familiar topic, useful work vocabulary—short enough to repeat until natural. Great for shadowing and speaking.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhǎo dào gōng zuò le ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 找到了。我在一家小公司工作。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǎo dào le. Wǒ zài yì jiā xiǎo gōng sī gōng zuò.
sentences.text_translation: Topdim. Men kichik bir kompaniyada ishlayapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нашёл. Я работаю в маленькой компании.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did. I work at a small company.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of work do you do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有一点辛苦，但是很有意思。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn xīn kǔ, dàn shì hěn yǒu yì si.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit tiring, but very interesting.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān jǐ diǎn shàng bān?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni soat nechada ishga borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты каждый день идёшь на работу?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you start work every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 早上九点上班，下午六点下班。
sentences.pinyin: Zǎo shang jiǔ diǎn shàng bān, xià wǔ liù diǎn xià bān.
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab soat to'qqizda ishga boraman, kechqurun soat oltida qaytaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Начинаю в девять утра, заканчиваю в шесть вечера.
sentences.text_translation_en: I start at nine in the morning and finish at six in the evening.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do you get a break at noon?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 休息一个小时，常常和同事一起吃饭。
sentences.pinyin: Xiū xi yí gè xiǎo shí, cháng cháng hé tóng shì yì qǐ chī fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bir soat dam olaman, ko'pincha hamkasblar bilan birga ovqatlanaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отдыхаю час, часто обедаю вместе с коллегами.
sentences.text_translation_en: I get an hour break, and I often eat with colleagues.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tóng shì hǎo xiāng chǔ ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are your colleagues easy to get along with?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo, tā men dōu hěn yǒu hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi, ularning barchasi juda samimiy.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень хорошо, они все очень дружелюбные.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very good, they're all very friendly.
sentences.speaker: B
